description: The issue was addressed with improved handling of icon caches. This issue is fixed in iOS 13.4 and iPadOS 13.4, macOS Catalina 10.15.4, tvOS 13.4, watchOS 6.2. A malicious application may be able to identify what other applications a user has installed.
